signal.name: fade_in_finished
signal.description: Emitted when the one-shot has finished fading in. Only emitted if fade-in time is greater than zero.

signal.name: fade_out_started
signal.description: Emitted when the one-shot has started fading out. Only emitted if fade-out time is greater than zero.

signal.name: finished
signal.description: Emitted when the one-shot has finished.

signal.name: started
signal.description: Emitted when the one-shot has started.
